use_cases: Drag-and-drop file uploads with visual feedback for SaaS applications
File upload in document management and content creation tools
Media file uploads for e-commerce product listings
Dark/light mode file upload interface for modern web apps
ai_summary: A React file uploader component with drag-and-drop support, dark mode toggle, and automatic file type detection with icons. Features file size formatting and a list view for managing uploaded files. Built with Tailwind CSS and Lucide icons for a clean, modern interface suitable for SaaS and content management applications.
